calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Nov-05-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Seth Bradley, Esq. for Petitioner.
Salvatore Mineo, Payee in propria persona.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER DRB CAPITAL, LLC'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is GRANTED.

Mr. Bradley to prepare a proposed order for court's review.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
